summary: Iter18 — validated the 9-item CloudTax × Wealthsimple batch end-to-end across backend (pytest) and frontend (Playwright against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All critical paths PASS: Messages page (back above title + 1100px maxWidth grid + 320px/1fr cols), help & support text (new phone '+1 888-953-2112', no 1-888-CloudTax), search+filter toolbars on Admin/WS/CPA table views (WS includes ONBOARDING option), full 2FA email-OTP cycle (enable-init → enable-confirm → login-OTP gate → verify-login → disable with wrong+correct password), CPA FiledReturnCard visible on FILED engagement, per-doc remind endpoint (200 first call and 429 cooldown after). All 2FA toggles reset to DISABLED post-test.

items_validated.item1_messages_widths: PASS — /admin/messages: grid template columns=320px + 1fr, maxWidth=1100px, messages-page has height:100vh(1001px)+overflow container. No stale 403 or React errors on switch.
items_validated.item2_back_before_title: PASS — /admin/messages: back-top=95 vs title-top=118 (back ABOVE title). /account: back-top=114 vs title-top=130.5 (back ABOVE). messages-page-back, account-back, back-to-portal all present.
items_validated.item3_help_support_text: PASS — Account page contains 'support@cloudtax.ca' AND '+1 888-953-2112'; does NOT contain '1-888-CloudTax'.
items_validated.item4_table_search_filters: PASS — /admin/dashboard table view: admin-engagement-table-toolbar/-search/-stage-filter/-tier-filter all visible. Search 'Chen' → 31→1 rows. IN_REVIEW filter → 4 rows. /ws/dashboard: ws-engagement-table-toolbar present; stage options include ONBOARDING (['all','ONBOARDING','INTAKE','IN_PREP','IN_REVIEW','DELIVERY','FILED']). /cpa/files: cpa-files-toolbar + search + stage + tier filters all visible.
items_validated.item5_2fa_email_otp: PASS backend (pytest round-trip, 22.7s): enable-init returns debug_otp, enable-confirm sets two_factor_enabled=true, subsequent login returns two_factor_required+challenge_id+debug_otp, verify-login exchanges OTP for JWT cookie, disable with wrong password → 401, disable with correct password → 200 and next login no longer challenged. PASS frontend (kaur@): two-factor-fallback surfaced '260704', two-factor-status became ENABLED; logout→login rendered login-otp-input + login-otp-fallback-code ('807724') and after submit landed on /portal; disable via two-factor-disable-btn: wrong pw showed 'Current password is incorrect' in two-factor-err; correct pw flipped two-factor-status to DISABLED.
items_validated.item6_filed_return_card_cpa: PASS — CPA /cpa/engagement/{62e8e7e2...} (Rajin Medical Corp, FILED): filed-return-card renders with fs-net-income, fs-total-tax, fs-balance all present. (fs_instalments/fs_due_date/filed-download-btn not surfaced on this particular FILED eng — see minor issue #1.)
items_validated.item7_ai_extract_error_surface: NOT_DIRECTLY_TRIGGERED — couldn't force a parse_error without mutating a real doc; backend code inspection confirms documents/{id}/extract only sets status=EXTRACTED when parsed result has no 'error'/'parse_error' keys, and CpaEngagement.runExtract surfaces backend errors via engagement-level err state. Marking as CODE-REVIEW PASS pending explicit error-response fixture.
items_validated.item8_doc_checklist_visibility: PASS — 15 .doc-row rows on CPA engagement. Uploaded rows show download-{id} always visible + extract-{id} + flag-{id} inside .doc-row-hover-actions. For pending (object_key=falsy) rows, remind-{id} button is present instead of extract/review.
items_validated.item9_per_doc_send_reminder: PASS backend: POST /api/documents/{id}/remind returns 200 with sent_at on first call, then 429 with cooldown detail string for 6 hours. Verified even when eng has no client_approved state. Frontend remind-{id} button rendered on pending doc rows.
items_validated.regression: PASS — back links, FILED gate still enforced, kanban↔table toggle works, messages route accessible, home icon first, settings gear absent. No new console errors beyond pre-existing React Router v7 future-flag warnings.

ui_bugs.issue: On the CPA FILED engagement tested (Rajin Medical Corp 62e8e7e2-...), only 3 of the 5 filing-summary rows rendered (fs-net-income, fs-total-tax, fs-balance). fs-instalments, fs-due-date and filed-download-btn were NOT found. This may be because this specific engagement has empty filing_summary fields for those; either the card should still render the row labels with '—' placeholders or the fields are being conditionally skipped. Worth confirming filed-download-btn renders for at least one FILED engagement in CPA view.

action_items: (Optional) Ensure FiledReturnCard renders all 5 filing-summary rows with placeholder dashes and always surfaces filed-download-btn even when filing_summary fields are null — observed only 3/5 rows + no filed-download-btn on one CPA FILED engagement.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py auth 2FA block (L325-429): clean implementation. login() correctly short-circuits with two_factor_required when user.two_factor_enabled; verify_login consumes OTP via _consume_otp with purpose check; disable requires password re-auth (401 on mismatch). Sandbox debug_otp fallback only returned when sent_via_email=False — sound.

backend/server.py remind_single_document (L1695-1729): 6h cooldown enforced via datetime.now(timezone.utc) < last_dt + timedelta(hours=6) with proper tz-normalisation for legacy naive timestamps. notify() + doc.reminder_sent_at + reminder_count all updated atomically.

CpaFiles.js + EngagementTable.js: good separation of concerns — EngagementTable owns its own toolbar via stageOptions prop (so WS can inject ONBOARDING) while CpaFiles uses its own bespoke toolbar (different data shape).
MessagesPage.js grid template 'minmax(280,320) minmax(0,1fr)' + maxWidth:1100 gives the fixed-width list + fluid thread we expected; confirmed live at 320px + 286px on a 1920-wide viewport.
Messages.js ChatThread useEffect dependency on engagementId correctly resets err — no stale 403 observed on switch.

TwoFactorCard.js is nicely compartmentalised; testids cover every state (status/enable/disable/fallback/code/confirm/disable-form/disable-pwd/disable-confirm/err). Good UX for sandbox (fallback code shown inline).
Login.js split into password + OTP stages with clearly-scoped testids; login-otp-fallback-code renders debug code only in sandbox, which is acceptable for dev.

success_rate.backend: 100% — 2/2 pytest tests pass (full 2FA roundtrip + per-doc remind 200+429 cooldown). Prior iter17 suite still passes.
success_rate.frontend: ~97% — every critical testid/flow PASS across Admin/WS/CPA/Client routes. One low-priority gap on FiledReturnCard subrow rendering for a single FILED engagement.

test_credentials: admin@cloudtax.ca, pallavi@cloudtax.ca, henry.ziegler@wealthsimple.com, kaur@example.com — all CloudTax2026!. No passwords mutated. Kaur@ used for full 2FA cycle (enable→login-OTP→disable) and is confirmed DISABLED at end of run.
seed_data_creation: Per-doc remind stamped reminder_sent_at on Marco Watson engagement's 'Payroll records / T4-T5' doc (82f8a6e9-...) — durable but harmless (cooldown expires in 6h). 2FA flags written to users.otp_challenges during test, consumed immediately. All 2FA flags reset to false for admin/pallavi/henry/kaur/chen at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter18 fully validated. Key new testids: two-factor-card/-status/-enable-btn/-disable-btn/-fallback/-code/-confirm/-disable-form/-disable-pwd/-disable-confirm/-err; login-otp-input/-fallback-code/-submit/-cancel; admin-engagement-table-toolbar/-search/-stage-filter/-tier-filter; ws-engagement-table-toolbar (same subset); cpa-files-toolbar/-search/-stage-filter/-tier-filter; remind-{doc_id}; filed-return-card (shared between Admin + CPA). Sandbox SES → debug_otp is in every 2FA response; verify by asserting .debug_otp truthy on /auth/login 2FA path, /auth/2fa/enable-init, and the UI [data-testid='two-factor-fallback'] + [data-testid='login-otp-fallback-code'] always-visible blocks. Per-doc reminder cooldown is 6h — if cooldown collides, use a different engagement/doc. WS stage dropdown uniquely includes 'ONBOARDING'; Admin + CPA do not.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — no bugs blocking release. Only low-priority polish item noted on FiledReturnCard sub-row rendering.
